name: decision-lab
description: A schema-first personal decision operating system with a local bot workflow for investment, finance, and management judgment.

scripts.check: node --check bin/decision-lab.js && node --check src/decision-core.js && node --check src/decision-agent.js && node --check src/decision-ai.js && node --check src/decision-api-contract.js && node --check src/decision-audit-log.js && node --check src/decision-backup.js && node --check src/decision-export.js && node --check src/decision-import.js && node --check src/decision-privacy.js && node --check src/decision-server.js && node --check src/decision-tools.js && node --check src/templates.js && node --check test/decision-core.test.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run doctor && npm run privacy:check && npm run pack:check
scripts.example:pipeline: node bin/decision-lab.js pipeline "Should we change enterprise pricing?" --type business --slug pricing-example
scripts.example:export: node bin/decision-lab.js export examples --format csv --out outputs/decisions.csv
